name: betynz-web
description: Betynz v5.8 fast SPA navigation, clean Zeus launch screen and touch-optimized mobile, Z Fold and tablet tabs.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check backend-client.js && node --check community-features.js && node --check engine-audit.js && node --check rebel-engine-core.js && node --check olympian-engine-core.js && node --check scripts/seed-guard.js && node --check scripts/fetch-data.js && node --check scripts/select-enrichment-plan.js && node --check scripts/merge-enriched-data.js && node --check scripts/enrich-xg.js && node --check scripts/enrich-rebel-odds.js && node --check scripts/build-snapshot.js && node --check scripts/build-dist.js && npm run test:rebels && npm run test:ppg && npm run test:audit && npm run test:rules && npm run validate
scripts.test:rebels: node tests/rebel-engine-tests.js && node tests/rebel-goal-correction-tests.js && node tests/universal-gg-rule-tests.js
